'''Vuh'jineau Mining Company''' was a mining business located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. The company reached its highest success during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
